mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedCount, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, review_time)) as avgReviewTime FROM review_record WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time <= #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) as yearWeek, CONCAT(YEAR(create_time), '-W', LPAD(WEEK(create_time), 2, '0')) as weekLabel, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, COUNT(DISTINCT paper_id) as uniquePapers FROM review_record WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time <= #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) ORDER BY yearWeek

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, review_time)) as avgReviewTime, (SELECT AVG(ct.check_rate) FROM check_task ct WHERE ct.paper_id = rr.paper_id AND ct.check_status = 2) as avgSimilarity FROM review_record rr WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time <= #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= #{currentStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as currentPeriod, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= #{previousStart} AND create_time < #{currentStart} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as previousPeriod FROM review_record WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND create_time >= #{previousStart}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pi.student_id) FROM paper_info pi INNER JOIN review_record rr ON pi.id = rr.paper_id WHERE rr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status IN ('auditing', 'completed', 'rejected') AND pi.is_deleted = 0

SELECT DATE(pi.create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedCount, AVG(pi.similarity_rate) as avgSimilarity, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pi.create_time, rr.review_time)) as avgReviewTime FROM paper_info pi LEFT JOIN review_record rr ON pi.id = rr.paper_id WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.create_time >= #{startDate} AND pi.create_time <= #{endDate} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(pi.create_time) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT DATE(pi.create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as reviewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedCount, AVG(pi.similarity_rate) as avgSimilarity, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pi.create_time, rr.review_time)) as avgReviewTime FROM paper_info pi LEFT JOIN review_record rr ON pi.id = rr.paper_id WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.create_time >= #{startDate} AND pi.create_time <= #{endDate} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(pi.create_time) ORDER BY date DESC

SELECT rr.review_status, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pi.student_id) as student_ids FROM review_record rr INNER JOIN paper_info pi ON rr.paper_id = pi.id WHERE rr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND rr.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND rr.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY rr.review_status
